title: FeePostingModalityTypeValues
description: Describes how and when the fee is posted to the customer account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Immediate Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee is debited at the time of transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: End-of-Day Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description: All fees are posted in a batch at day-end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Aggregated Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Several fees are grouped and posted together (e.g. monthly statement).
